title: Why Gendo is a jerk
wikitext:
[]: Why Gendo is a jerk             Quote Post by rain1776 » Mon Dec 17, 2007 8:07 pm I was wondering, i have this theory about why gendo was such a jerk to Shinji, and i was wondering if anyone else had any other theories, but here it goes. In end of evangelion, when the giant Rei is face to face with unit one in the sky, they show seele, and 01 talks about how they need the pilot to be emotionally unstable for human instrumentality. Is this why he was such a jerk, to help with the dead sea scroll prophecies?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Dec 17, 2007 8:19 pm he was scared about how to act around Shinji because he kinda had Shinjis same problem. her scared to get close to anybody because he's afrain of getting hurt. the Hedgehogs Dilemma

[]:             Quote Post by Semisubtle » Mon Dec 17, 2007 8:25 pm Yui says in EoE (y'know, the scene where she's standing with Rei and Kaworu during Instrumentality) that he was "afraid of the invisible bonds people form" or something along those lines. So basically, yeah, he has the same issue as Shinji, only instead of being a spineless crybaby he's just an asshole.

[]:             Quote Post by rain1776 » Mon Dec 17, 2007 8:28 pm hmm. i guess. i could never unnderstand why he had to be such a big jerk. if he wasnt, maybe Shinji wouldnt be so whiny

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Dec 17, 2007 8:38 pm he lost care for everything after Yui dissapeared, and dedicated his entire life to getting her back, regardless of how other people feel or think of him

[]:             Quote Post by kaji kun » Mon Dec 17, 2007 9:52 pm Gendou really is a tragic character in his mind. He lost his wife, and in doing so put fort all of his energy and resources to get her back. The problem was, he left his son and completely alienated him. The scene in EoE really made me tear up, when Gendo says that he didn't think that he deserved to be loved and that if he'd stayed with Shinji he'd only hurt him, and because of this it would be better to do nothing at all. I can really empathize with Gendo; yeah, he's horrible in the way he treats Shinji and uses people towards his own ends, but what pushed the guy so far where he feels like he'd cause everyone nothing but pain by opening up?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Dec 17, 2007 10:19 pm He was already used to being treated like trash by the time he met Fuyutsuki in 1999...that was about sixteen, seventeen years before the madness of 2I. We don't know much about Gendo's past or how he got involved with Lorenz in the first place, but he clearly did get involved some time before he met Fuyutsuki. It seems like being treated like trash and/or feeling he was worthless and someone to be beaten up at odd times was enough to slowly, surely twist him off. But he does care...when you catch him off-guard, like the unexpected Eva-00 berserk incident, he shows that he does care.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Dec 17, 2007 11:00 pm check out this thread: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3426

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Dec 18, 2007 12:52 pm UrsusArctos wrote: He was already used to being treated like trash by the time he met Fuyutsuki in 1999...that was about sixteen, seventeen years before the madness of 2I .

Article: Why Gendo is a jerk
 He lost his wife, and in doing so put fort all of his energy and resources to get her back. The problem was, he left his son and completely alienated him. The scene in EoE really made me tear up, when Gendo says that he didn't think that he deserved to be loved and that if he'd stayed with Shinji he'd only hurt him, and because of this it would be better to do nothing at all. I can really empathize with Gendo; yeah, he's horrible in the way he treats Shinji and uses people towards his own ends, but what pushed the guy so far where he feels like he'd cause everyone nothing but pain by opening up?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Dec 17, 2007 10:19 pm He was already used to being treated like trash by the time he met Fuyutsuki in 1999...that was about sixteen, seventeen years before the madness of 2I. We don't know much about Gendo's past or how he got involved with Lorenz in the first place, but he clearly did get involved some time before he met Fuyutsuki. It seems like being treated like trash and/or feeling he was worthless and someone to be beaten up at odd times was enough to slowly, surely twist him off. But he does care...when you catch him off-guard, like the unexpected Eva-00 berserk incident, he shows that he does care.
